item.title:
jordannorris98: Tommy Rooney reposteó Jordan Norris @jordannorris98 · 4h FT: Munster Under-20 Football Championship Phase 2 Round 2
Cla
item.description:
Tommy Rooney reposteó Jordan Norris @jordannorris98 · 4h FT: Munster Under-20 Football Championship Phase 2 Round 2
Clare 2-13 (19) Waterford 2-14 (20)
Waterford’s SIXTH Munster underage football win of 2026.
Paddy McCarthy, Joe Brennan and David Nyhan outstanding
A Munster final up for grabs v Cork. 3 9 174 14 mil

item.title: tonyleen: Maurice Brosnan reposteó Tony Leen @tonyleen · 3h Many will tell u print is dead and @examinersport is wasting our tim
item.description: Maurice Brosnan reposteó Tony Leen @tonyleen · 3h Many will tell u print is dead and @examinersport is wasting our time producing preview mag for GAA Championship 2026. You will be the judge of that. It’s free with Friday’s @irishexaminer print edition and available to our subscribers. Hope u enjoy. But more importantly, support 5 26 111 10 mil

item.title:
BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 2h "It's going to be a huge task"
As they prepare to face Derry in Saturday's Ulster quarte
item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 2h "It's going to be a huge task"
As they prepare to face Derry in Saturday's Ulster quarter-final, can the Saffrons summon the spirit of 2000 or will their provincial curse continue?
#BBCGAA 1 2 1 mil

item.title: BBCSPORTNI: BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 2h En respuesta a @BBCSPORTNI Antrim have work to do for glory days to return De bbc.co.uk 7
